---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for DCENT_OS
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

> DCENT_OS's direction is set by D-Central (see GOVERNANCE.md). Feature requests are welcome and
> read, but not all will fit the roadmap — and that's fine, the GPL means you can always fork.

## The problem
What home-mining pain point does this solve? (Be concrete.)

## Proposed solution
What you'd like DCENT_OS to do.

## Alternatives considered
Other ways to solve it, and why this is better.

## Which value does it advance?
<!-- safety / honesty / openness / home-miner UX / decentralization — see GOVERNANCE.md -->

## Additional context
Hardware involved, competitor behavior for reference, mockups, etc.
